title: Leveraging AI Tools to Enhance Your Video SEO Workflow
excerpt: From automated transcription to AI-generated timestamps, learn which artificial intelligence tools can dramatically speed up and improve your Video SEO processes.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
You don't need to do everything manually. A new suite of AI tools is making Video SEO faster and more effective than ever.

Essential AI Workflows

Use tools like Descript for instant, highly accurate transcriptions. Leverage ChatGPT or Claude to generate SEO-optimized titles, descriptions, and tag variations based on your transcript. You can even use AI to automatically generate YouTube chapters (timestamps), which are critical for capturing Google search snippets.
